item.title: 阿里认领屠榜神秘模型「欢乐马」，ATH 郑波团队打造
item.guid: 阿里认领屠榜神秘模型「欢乐马」，ATH-郑波团队打造
item.description:
Yesterday, Alibaba ATH confirmed that the mysterious chart-topping video model HappyHorse was developed by its innovation business unit. 昨天，阿里巴巴 ATH 确认神秘屠榜视频模型 HappyHorse 为旗下创新事业部研发。

Previously, the model burst onto the scene on the AI evaluation platform Artificial Analysis's video arena rankings, dominating multiple tracks such as text-to-video and image-to-video with overwhelming performance, directly surpassing the recently popular ByteDance Seedance 2.0, sparking widespread speculation. 此前，该模型在 AI 评测平台 Artificial Analysis 视频竞技场榜单上横空出世、以压倒性表现登顶文生视频、图生视频等多个赛道，直接超越近期热度颇高的字节 Seedance 2.0，引发广泛猜测。

APPSO exclusively learned that the team responsible for the HappyHorse video generation model is Zheng Bo's team from Alibaba ATH. APPSO 独家获悉，负责 HappyHorse 视频生成模型的是来自阿里 ATH 的郑波团队。

Zheng Bo is currently Vice President of Alibaba. After joining Alibaba in September 2017, he successively served as head of Taobao search and recommendation algorithms, CTO of Alimama, and head of algorithm technology for Taotian Group. His research areas cover large models, multimodal AI, decision intelligence, deep learning, and search recommendation advertising algorithms. 郑波现任阿里巴巴副总裁，2017 年 9 月加入阿里巴巴后历任淘宝搜推算法负责人、阿里妈妈 CTO、淘天集团算法技术负责人，研究方向涵盖大模型、多模态、决策智能、深度学习及搜索推荐广告算法等领域。

Alibaba stated that HappyHorse is currently in internal testing, and its API interface is scheduled to open on April 30. The model supports four video generation modes: text-to-video and image-to-video, with the option to add native audio for each mode. 阿里方面表示，HappyHorse 目前仍处于内测阶段，API 接口计划于 4 月 30 日开放。该模型支持四种视频生成模式：文本转视频与图像转视频，每种模式均可选择是否添加原生音频。

The ATH Innovation Business Unit also revealed that it has launched an exploration plan for new interaction methods in the AI era, of which HappyHorse is a component, and more products will be launched sequentially. ATH 创新事业部同时透露，已启动一项面向 AI 时代全新交互方式的探索计划，HappyHorse 是该方向的组成部分，后续还将陆续推出更多产品。

Alibaba also noted that all "official websites" circulating online previously are not official channels. 阿里方面同时提示，此前网络上流传的「官网」均非官方渠道。

item.title: 山姆·奥特曼住所遭燃烧弹袭击、OpenAI 总部遭威胁
item.guid: 山姆·奥特曼住所遭燃烧弹袭击、OpenAI-总部遭威胁
item.description:
According to CNBC and BBC reports, at 4:12 AM local time on April 10, a man threw a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's private residence in North Beach, causing a fire outside the gate before fleeing the scene on foot. 据 CNBC 及 BBC 报道，当地时间 4 月 10 日凌晨 4 时 12 分，一名男子向 OpenAI CEO 萨姆·奥特曼（Sam Altman）位于北海滩（North Beach）的私人住宅投掷燃烧弹，导致大门外侧起火后徒步逃离现场。

Approximately 55 minutes later, the same man appeared outside OpenAI's San Francisco headquarters, openly threatening to burn down the entire building, and was immediately arrested by arriving police. The suspect is a 20-year-old male, currently in custody; his specific identity and motive have not yet been released, and the investigation is ongoing. 约 55 分钟后，同一名男子出现在 OpenAI 旧金山总部大楼外，公开扬言要焚烧整栋建筑，随即被赶到的警方当场逮捕。该嫌疑人为一名 20 岁男性，目前已被羁押，具体身份及犯罪动机尚未公布，案件调查仍在进行中。

There were no casualties in the incident. OpenAI issued a statement saying: "We are grateful for the quick response of the San Francisco Police Department and the support from the city government in ensuring the safety of our employees. The suspect is currently in custody, and we are fully cooperating with law enforcement's investigation." 事件中无人员伤亡。OpenAI 发表声明称：「感谢旧金山警方的快速响应以及市政府在保障员工安全方面给予的支持。嫌疑人目前已被羁押，我们正全力配合执法部门的调查工作。」

Altman publicly spoke out about the incident on his personal blog that day, attaching a family photo. He wrote that he "underestimated the power of language and narrative" and stated that the past few years have been "extremely tense, chaotic, and stressful," calling on all parties in the AI industry to de-escalate their "words and actions." 奥特曼当天在个人博客上就此事公开发声，并附上了一张家人合影。他写道，自己「低估了语言和叙事的力量」，并表示过去几年「极度紧张、混乱且充满压力」，呼吁 AI 行业各方对「言辞和行动方式」进行降温。

He also expressed understanding of external criticism and concerns about technology but remains convinced that technological progress can bring positive impacts to the future. 他同时表示理解外界对技术的批评与担忧，但仍坚信技术进步能够为未来带来积极影响。

item.title: 梁文锋内部透露：DeepSeek V4 将于 4 月下旬正式亮相
item.guid: 梁文锋内部透露：DeepSeek-V4-将于-4-月下旬正式亮相
item.description:
According to "Chuang Zhi Ji" (Innovation Record), DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng recently revealed in an internal communication that DeepSeek V4 will be officially released later this month . 据《创智记》报道，DeepSeek 创始人梁文锋近日在内部沟通中透露， DeepSeek V4 将于本月下旬正式发布 。

Previously, the release of V4 had been delayed multiple times. It was originally planned to be launched around mid-February during the Chinese New Year, but was continuously postponed due to deep adaptation to domestic computing power, architectural refactoring, and stability refinement. 此前，V4 的发布时间已多次延期。原计划于今年 2 月中旬春节前后推出，后因国产算力深度适配、架构重构与稳定性打磨等原因持续推迟。

On a technical level, V4 will bring a trillion-parameter scale and a million-level context window, and for the first time, achieve deep adaptation with domestic chips such as Huawei Ascend. It is reported that V4's biggest technical highlight is the breakthrough in LTM (Long Term Memory) capability. 在技术层面，V4 将带来万亿参数规模与百万级上下文窗口，并首次实现与华为昇腾等国产芯片的深度适配。据悉，V4 最大的技术亮点在于 LTM（Long Term Memory，长期记忆）能力的突破。

Despite high external expectations, several AI entrepreneurs who have collaborated closely with DeepSeek suggest that V4 will find it difficult to replicate the market influence of last year's DeepSeek-V3. Meanwhile, Liang Wenfeng is pushing the company to extend from pure model R&D to the application layer, forming product teams, and initiating company valuation to clarify employee option values. 尽管外界期待颇高，但多位与 DeepSeek 深入合作的 AI 创业者提示，V4 很难再复制去年 DeepSeek-V3 的市场影响力。与此同时，梁文锋正推动公司从纯模型研发向应用层延伸，组建产品团队，并启动公司估值以明确员工期权价值。

item.title: 「龙虾之父」Claude 账号被封又解封，官方：系统误判
item.guid: 「龙虾之父」Claude-账号被封又解封，官方：系统误判
item.description:
Early this morning, Peter Steinberger, the founder of OpenClaw, posted on the X platform, stating that his Claude account had been banned. 今天凌晨，OpenClaw 的创始人 Peter Steinberger 在 X 平台发文，称自己的 Claude 账号遭到封禁。

He shared an email from Anthropic's security team, which was brief, merely stating that they "determined there was a violation of the usage policy," without specifying the exact terms violated or providing any prior warning. 他晒出了一封来自 Anthropic 安全团队的邮件，邮件措辞简短，仅表示「认定存在违反使用政策的行为」，未说明具体违规条款，亦无任何事先警告。

Steinberger stated that not only was API access banned, but his personal account was also affected, meaning he couldn't even perform routine compatibility tests. Steinberger 表示，被封禁的不只是 API 访问权限，个人账号同样受到波及，这意味着他连日常的兼容性测试都无法正常进行。

In the future, ensuring OpenClaw can still run on Anthropic's models will likely become increasingly difficult.

Anthropic employee Thariq Shihipar later appeared in the comments section, stating that the ban "was likely a misjudgment by another somewhat overly sensitive abuse detection classifier," not an active decision against OpenClaw users, and promised to message Steinberger to assist with the issue. Shortly after, Steinberger tweeted to confirm his account had been restored. Anthropic 员工 Thariq Shihipar 随后出现在评论区，表示封号「很可能是另一个有点过于敏感的滥用检测分类器误判了」，并非针对 OpenClaw 用户的主动决定，并承诺私信 Steinberger 协助处理。不久后，Steinberger 发推确认账号已恢复。

🔗 Related Reading: Breaking | Claude of the "Father of Lobsters" Banned, Official: System Misjudgment 🔗 相关阅读： 突发｜龙虾之父的 Claude 被封了，官方：系统误判

item.title: AI 能力将成教师「必考项」
item.guid: AI-能力将成教师「必考项」
item.description:
According to reports from Xinhua News Agency and CCTV News, five departments including the Ministry of Education recently jointly issued the "Artificial Intelligence + Education" Action Plan, aiming to integrate the cultivation of AI talent with application innovation, and systematically build an education system for the intelligent era. 据新华社、央视新闻报道，教育部等五部门近日联合印发《「人工智能+教育」行动计划》，旨在一体推进人工智能人才培养与应用创新，系统构建智能时代的教育体系。

Yesterday, the Ministry of Education disclosed the core content of the action plan at a press conference. One of the most attention-grabbing measures is: artificial intelligence will be officially incorporated into teacher qualification examinations and certification content, and AI capability will become one of the basic professional qualities for future teachers . 昨日，教育部在新闻发布会上披露了该行动计划的核心内容。其中最受关注的一项举措是：人工智能将被正式纳入教师资格考试和认证内容， AI 能力将成为未来教师的基本职业素养之一 。

    In terms of teaching, the action plan proposes to strengthen the application of intelligent teaching systems around the full-process teaching scenarios before, during, and after class, helping teachers reduce burdens and increase efficiency; at the same time, it assists in homework management, promoting intelligent grading, Q&A, and tutoring; it also uses intelligent technology to analyze classroom teaching behavior, helping teachers improve teaching quality;

    For basic education, the action plan clearly accelerates the popularization of AI education for primary and secondary school students, requiring the full, sufficient, and effective offering of relevant courses, and promoting the comprehensive inclusion of AI education into local curriculum systems. In addition, the plan also encourages interdisciplinary AI teaching and promotes its integration into after-school services, study tours, and other activities;

    At the higher education level, the action plan requires promoting artificial intelligence as a public basic course in universities, compiling textbooks by discipline and major, and promoting all students to master AI-related knowledge.

At the same time, universities will be guided to offer interdisciplinary AI integration courses, enrich interdisciplinary and cross-professional course clusters, cultivate compound interdisciplinary talents, and establish a batch of new disciplines and majors adapted to new technologies, new industries, and new business forms, in line with the intelligent upgrading trend of industrial structures. 与此同时，高校将被引导开设人工智能交叉融合课程，丰富跨学科、跨专业课程群，培养复合型交叉人才，并根据产业结构的智能化升级趋势，新设一批适应新技术、新产业、新业态的学科专业。

item.title: 亿咖通科技官宣正式承接 Flyme OS 全业务
item.guid: 亿咖通科技官宣正式承接-Flyme-OS-全业务
item.description:
ECARX Technology announced yesterday that it has officially commenced taking over all core assets and businesses of Flyme OS, a subsidiary of Xingji Meizu Group. 亿咖通科技昨日宣布，正式启动承接星纪魅族集团旗下 Flyme OS 全部核心资产与业务。

According to the integration arrangement, all intellectual property rights covered by the Flyme OS brand, as well as all operational businesses, customer contracts, and R&D teams of Flyme Auto, will be fully incorporated into ECARX Technology and managed uniformly by the company. 根据整合安排，Flyme OS 品牌所涵盖的全部知识产权，以及 Flyme Auto 的全部在运业务、客户合同及研发团队，将整体纳入亿咖通科技，由公司统一运营管理。

ECARX Technology was co-founded in 2016 by Li Shufu, founder of Geely Holding Group, and Shen Ziyu. Geely Holding is a key strategic shareholder—this January, Geely Holding just completed a targeted additional investment of $45.6 million in ECARX at a price of $1.67 per share. 亿咖通科技由吉利控股集团创始人李书福与沈子瑜于 2016 年联合创立，吉利控股是其重要战略股东——今年 1 月，吉利控股刚以每股 1.67 美元的价格完成对亿咖通 4560 万美元的定向增持。

This integration of Flyme OS business is a continuation of Geely's internal "One Geely" strategy of consolidation and resource centralization, aiming to unify its smart mobility-related assets under the ECARX platform for operation. 此次 Flyme OS 业务整合，正是吉利体系内「一个吉利」战略收缩与资源集中的延续动作，旨在将旗下智能出行相关资产统一归口至亿咖通平台运营。

Leveraging its existing capabilities in smart cockpit software and hardware platforms and global delivery, ECARX Technology will accelerate the adaptation of operating systems to in-car application scenarios, enhancing synergy efficiency and product iteration capabilities. The integration work will proceed in an orderly manner according to business priorities, clarifying responsibilities, properly relocating employees, and ensuring a smooth transition. 依托在智能座舱软硬件平台及全球化交付方面的既有能力，亿咖通科技将加速操作系统与车载应用场景的适配，提升协同效率和产品迭代能力。整合工作将按照业务优先级有序推进，明确权责边界，妥善安置员工，确保平稳过渡。

Subsequently, ECARX Technology plans to integrate Flyme OS product advantages, incorporate AI agents, build a cross-terminal intelligent ecosystem, and accelerate AI co-existence in mobility scenarios. 后续，亿咖通科技计划整合 Flyme OS 产品优势，融入 AI 智能体，构建跨终端智能生态，加速出行场景 AI 共生。

item.title: 苹果 Mac 一季度出货量增长 9%，增速领跑全球 PC 市场
item.guid: 苹果-Mac-一季度出货量增长-9%，增速领跑全球-PC-市场
item.description:
According to the latest data released by market research firm IDC, Apple's Mac shipments grew by 9% year-on-year in the first quarter of 2026, outperforming the overall global PC market. During the same period, the global PC market's overall growth rate was only 2.5%. 市场研究机构 IDC 发布的最新数据显示，苹果 2026 年第一季度 Mac 出货量同比增长 9%，增速跑赢全球 PC 大盘。同期，全球 PC 市场整体增长率仅为 2.5%。

In this quarter, Apple's total Mac shipments reached 6.2 million units, a steady increase from 5.7 million units in the same period last year; in terms of global market share, Apple climbed from 8.9% in the same period last year to 9.5%, firmly ranking fourth among PC manufacturers globally. 该季度，苹果 Mac 总出货量达 620 万台，较去年同期的 570 万台稳步提升；全球市场份额方面，苹果由去年同期的 8.9% 攀升至 9.5%，在 PC 厂商中稳居全球第四。

The top three on the list were Lenovo (16.5 million units), HP (12.1 million units), and Dell (10.3 million units), respectively. IDC statistics show that, with the exception of HP, most leading PC brands achieved positive shipment growth in this quarter. 榜单前三名依次为联想（1650 万台）、惠普（1210 万台）和戴尔（1030 万台）。IDC 统计显示，除惠普外，多数头部 PC 品牌均在该季度实现出货量正增长。

item.title: 微信官宣九项新功能：公众号上线「话题」功能，跨设备传文件无需加好友
item.guid: 微信官宣九项新功能：公众号上线「话题」功能，跨设备传文件无需加好友
item.description:
Yesterday, WeChat's official account "WeChat Open Class" published an article, summarizing 9 feature updates launched intensively in March, covering multiple dimensions such as content creation, cross-border payments, file transfer, and business ecosystem: 昨天，微信官方号「微信公开课」发文，盘点了 3 月集中推出 9 项功能更新，覆盖内容创作、跨境支付、文件传输、商业生态等多个维度：

    Official Accounts now have a "Topics" feature , allowing creators to proactively initiate topics and build dedicated topic pages to aggregate and display similar content published by themselves and produced by fans. Users can access these through #topic links in the main text, "More related content" at the bottom of articles, and the "Look" section of Official Accounts;

    The number of short videos for product promotion on Video Accounts has increased . Creators with 1,000 followers and short video product sharing permissions can post 5 videos per day for accounts with fewer than 100,000 followers, and 10 videos per day for accounts with 100,000 followers or more. Video Account short videos also support attaching "product collections," allowing creators to package multiple related products for one-time listing, enabling a single video to promote multiple items;

    The Video Account Mini-Game Quality Creator Incentive Program has launched , running until April 30th. Video Account creators or external platform creators with over 1,000 followers can register, publish qualifying videos, and attach mini-game monetization tasks to receive basic cash incentives. Viral videos will also receive additional, uncapped rewards;

    WeChat and WeChat Work now support AI agent integration . WeChat has launched ClawBot plugin capabilities, allowing users to connect their Claw via WeChat chat. WeChat Work has introduced a QR code-based "Claw" integration feature and officially launched its CLI open-source project on GitHub, targeting businesses with 10 or fewer employees. It supports mainstream AI agents such as Claude Code, Codex, Work Buddy, and QClaw, opening up 7 core capabilities to AI, including messages, schedules, documents, and meetings;

    New face-to-face cross-device scan-to-transfer file function added , supporting photo and file transfers between iPhones and Android phones, no need to add friends, supports original image direct transfer, and does not rely on mobile networks or external Wi-Fi networks;

    Compressed packages support direct preview ; after receiving a compressed package, you can view its content without downloading or unzipping, and you can also select single or multiple files for one-click saving, forwarding, or favoriting;

    New ticket machines at all stations on Seoul Subway Lines 1 to 8 support WeChat Pay for ticket purchases , in addition to single-journey tickets, you can also scan to buy T-money cards, climate cards, and regular passes;

    WeChat Mini Store product tags updated ; Tencent Ads (Mini Store version) has added "Trending Products" and "Opportunity Products" tags, and the system will label both managed and unmanaged products to help merchants more efficiently identify high-potential products;

    WeChat Mini Store launches six major benefits for new merchants , including 0 deposit trial operation, self-operated transaction technical service fee rate reduced to 1%, traffic incentives, growth strategies, and free trials of hundreds of operational tools, helping new merchants quickly get started.

item.title: 追觅俞浩：要把宇树的一切全部抢过来
item.guid: 追觅俞浩：要把宇树的一切全部抢过来
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, a screenshot of a chat message posted by Yu Hao, founder of Roborock Technology, in the internal work group "Magic Atom" was exposed yesterday. 据界面新闻报道，昨日，一张追觅科技创始人俞浩在内部工作群「魔法原子」中发布的聊天截图曝光。

The screenshot shows Yu Hao demanding in a strong tone that the team launch a full counterattack against competitor Unitree Robotics, proposing "a 200 million annual salary to recruit a chief scientist," and also demanding to seize Unitree Robotics' customers, bids, employees, and live streaming resources, even shouting, "All of Unitree's customers, all bids, all employees must be taken over." 截图显示，俞浩以强硬语气要求团队对竞争对手宇树科技展开全面反击，并提出「2 亿年薪招首席科学家」，同时要求抢夺宇树科技的客户、投标、员工及直播间资源，甚至喊出「宇树的所有客户、所有投标、所有员工要全部抢过来」。

Magic Atom is the core entity under Roborock Technology focusing on embodied AI robot business, with Yu Hao serving as its founder and actual controller. 魔法原子是追觅科技旗下专注具身智能机器人业务的核心主体，由俞浩担任创始人与实际控制人。

item.title: 集邦咨询：今年中国人形机器人产量预计年增 94%，宇树、智元合计占八成份额
item.guid: 集邦咨询：今年中国人形机器人产量预计年增-94%，宇树、智元合计占八成份额
item.description:
According to TrendForce's latest in-depth research report on humanoid robots, the global humanoid robot industry will enter a critical stage of commercialization in the second half of this year. Chinese manufacturers are actively increasing production, which is expected to drive a year-on-year increase of up to 94% in China's humanoid robot market output for the entire year. 根据 TrendForce 集邦咨询最新的人形机器人深度研究报告，今年下半年全球人形机器人产业将进入商业化的关键阶段。中国厂商积极提升产量，预计将推动今年全年中国人形机器人市场产量年增高达 94%。

The research report predicts that Unitree Robotics and Zhimian Robotics will stand out in the fierce competition due to their respective profitability and mass production progress, and together they are expected to capture nearly 80% of the market share . 研报预计，宇树科技与智元机器人凭借各自的盈利能力与量产进度，在激烈竞争中脱颖而出， 两者合计预计将囊括近 80% 的市场出货份额 。

Unitree Robotics applied for an IPO on the STAR Market at the end of March and was accepted. Its listing prospectus shows that its humanoid robot product revenue will surpass quadruped robots for the first time in 2025, accounting for over 51% of total revenue, with a combined gross profit margin of 60% for both businesses, breaking the public's inherent impression that the robot industry "only burns money and doesn't make a profit." 宇树科技于三月底申请科创板 IPO 并获受理，上市招股书显示其 2025 年人形机器人产品收入首度超越四足机器人，占总收入 51% 以上，两项业务合计毛利率达 60%，打破了外界对机器人产业「只烧钱不盈利」的固有印象。

Zhimian Robotics saw the completion and factory rollout of its 10,000th general-purpose embodied robot, Expedition A3, at the end of March. After Zhimian increased its 2025 mass production target from 1,000 units to 5,000 units, it achieved the milestone of 10,000 units in just three months. 智元机器人于三月底迎来第 10000 台通用具身机器人远征 A3 完工出厂。智元将 2025 年量产数量从 1000 台提升至 5000 台后，仅用三个月便达成了一万台的里程碑。

From the perspective of overall industry trends, TrendForce points out that while most humanoid robot manufacturers previously focused on accumulating underlying capabilities such as perception, dynamic balance, and semantic understanding, the focus in the second half of this year will shift to providing real value to users. 从整体产业趋势来看，TrendForce 集邦咨询指出，此前多数人形机器人厂商专注于感知、动态平衡与语义理解等底层能力的积累，今年下半年焦点将转向为用户提供真实价值。

item.title: 小米 7 篇论文入选 ACL 2026：推理快 8 倍、80 页合同秒读
item.guid: 小米-7-篇论文入选-ACL-2026：推理快-8-倍、80-页合同秒读
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaomi Technology announced that the Xiaomi AI team had 7 research achievements selected for ACL 2026, covering seven directions: edge-side inference optimization, multi-page document understanding, long-context attention, general information extraction, conversational speech generation, mobile AI agent evaluation, and training strategies. 昨天，小米技术宣布，小米 AI 团队共有 7 篇研究成果入选 ACL 2026，覆盖端侧推理优化、多页文档理解、长上下文注意力、通用信息抽取、对话语音生成、手机 AI 智能体评测与训练策略七个方向。

ACL is a top-tier CCF-A conference in the field of natural language processing, and this year's conference will be held in San Diego, USA, in July. ACL 是自然语言处理领域 CCF-A 类顶级会议，本届大会将于今年 7 月在美国圣地亚哥举行。

    In the direction of inference optimization, VecInfer achieves an 8.3x end-to-end latency reduction on Llama-3.1-8B with 196k context by compressing KV cache through vector quantization, still approaching full-precision performance under 2-bit quantization;

    In the direction of document understanding, Doc-V* can process long documents of over 80 pages without OCR, achieving open-source optimal performance on four public benchmarks, an improvement of 9.8 percentage points compared to the RAG baseline;

    Addressing the "only looking at the beginning and end, ignoring the middle" problem in large models, Attention Basin proposes the AttnRank method, which improves long-text understanding solely through lightweight document reordering, requiring no training and incurring zero additional latency;

    In the speech direction, ZipVoice-Dialog achieves non-autoregressive two-person conversational speech generation, and the team simultaneously open-sourced OpenDialog, the first conversational speech dataset of 6800 hours;

    In terms of AI agent evaluation, MobileBench-OL covers 1080 tasks across 80 mainstream Chinese applications, and the results show that the strongest current AI has a success rate of less than 20% when facing operations involving more than 20 steps;

    In terms of training strategy, STEP uses success-rate-aware adaptive resampling to focus on training difficult tasks, converging faster under the same computational budget;

    ProUIE, with a 4B parameter backbone and without introducing any external information, surpasses various strong baselines on 36 public datasets.

item.title: 生数科技完成近 20 亿元 B 轮融资，阿里云领投
item.guid: 生数科技完成近-20-亿元-B-轮融资，阿里云领投
item.description:
Shengshu Technology announced yesterday the completion of a nearly 2 billion RMB Series B funding round, led by Alibaba Cloud, with strategic investments from institutions such as China Internet Investment Fund, Jiu'an Haitang, TAL Education Group, and Guanghe Ventures, and continued additional investments from existing shareholders including Xinglian Capital, DT Capital, C&D Emerging Investment, BV Baidu Ventures, and Zhuoyuan Asia. 生数科技昨天宣布完成近 20 亿元人民币 B 轮融资，由阿里云领投，中网投、九安海棠、好未来、光合创投等机构战略投资，星连资本、达泰资本、建发新兴投资、BV 百度风投、卓源亚洲等原有股东持续追加。

Following the completion of the financing, Shengshu Technology stated that it will continue to strengthen the underlying capabilities of its general world model, accelerate its global talent strategy, and build a core team to support the development of cutting-edge models and global business. 融资完成后，生数科技表示将持续夯实通用世界模型底层能力，并加速全球化人才布局，构建支撑前沿模型与全球业务发展的核心团队。

item.title: 无偿转让失败，360doc 个人图书馆宣布 5 月 1 日关停
item.guid: 无偿转让失败，360doc-个人图书馆宣布-5-月-1-日关停
item.description:
According to Bianews, 360doc Personal Library, a personal knowledge base platform operating for over two decades, announced that it will officially terminate all services on May 1, 2026. 据鞭牛士报道，运营逾二十年的个人知识库平台 360doc 个人图书馆宣布，将于 2026 年 5 月 1 日正式终止所有服务。

Founder Cai Zhi issued a farewell letter stating that over the past two months, he attempted to transfer the platform for free, but ultimately failed. He had negotiated with internet giants capable of taking over, developed plans, and promoted pilot projects, "waiting, pleading, and enduring," but ultimately "was shelved, pushed aside, and exhausted his last ounce of strength." 创始人蔡智发布告别信称，过去两个月他尝试将平台无偿转让，但最终以失败告终。他曾与具备承接能力的互联网巨头洽谈，做过方案、推进过试点，「也等过、求过、忍过」，但最终「被搁置，被推诿，熬尽了最后一丝力量」。

Earlier in January this year, 360doc had issued a free transfer announcement, seeking partners with sincerity and capability to take over all platform assets, including core technology, data, and the operations team, and requiring the transferee to possess financial strength of no less than 5 million RMB, as well as a clear and feasible sustainable operation plan. 此前今年 1 月，360doc 曾发布无偿转让公告，寻求具备诚意与能力的伙伴接管平台全站资产，包括核心技术、数据及运营团队，并要求接手方具备不少于 500 万元的资金实力，以及清晰可行的持续运营计划。

Cai Zhi revealed in the letter that cross-industry friends and startups also extended olive branches, but he ultimately did not choose them, stating that "without internet experience and AI capabilities, taking over this platform would only become a burden." 蔡智在信中透露，也有跨界朋友与创业公司递来橄榄枝，但他最终未予选择，原因是「没有互联网经验、没有 AI 能力，这个平台接过去，只会变成负担」。

He also firmly rejected those who attempted to purchase domain names and user data, stating, "The data of 80 million users, once it flows into the gray market, the consequences would be unimaginable." Cai Zhi said that rather than leaving potential risks for the future or being resold, "it's better to personally draw a secure end while it's still controllable." 他同时坚决拒绝了试图购买域名和用户数据的人，「8000 万用户的数据，一旦流入灰产，后果不堪设想」。蔡智表示，与其将隐患留给未来或被转卖，「不如在还可控的时候，亲手画上一个稳妥的句号」。

360doc Personal Library was launched in 2005. Currently, the platform has over 80 million users and has collected over 1.1 billion articles. 360doc 个人图书馆于 2005 年上线，目前平台用户超 8000 万，收录文章逾 11 亿篇。

item.title: 💡 Arm CEO：AI 自研芯片潜在市场超 1000 亿美元，可触达总市场或破万亿
item.guid: 💡-Arm-CEO：AI-自研芯片潜在市场超-1000-亿美元，可触达总市场或破万亿
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Arm CEO Rene Haas stated in an interview yesterday that the AI wave is bringing market opportunities worth hundreds of billions of dollars to the chip industry, and Arm has shifted its strategic focus from smartphones to data centers and cloud computing. 据彭博社报道，Arm CEO Rene Haas 昨天在采访中表示，AI 浪潮正在为芯片行业带来规模高达千亿美元的市场机遇，而 Arm 已将战略重心从智能手机转向数据中心与云计算。

Haas pointed out that the rise of Agentic AI demands four times the CPU computing power of traditional AI, and the current data center market's supply for this demand is severely insufficient. He also revealed that multiple clients have proactively approached Arm with custom chip requirements, which has prompted the company to launch its first self-developed chip product. Haas 指出，智能体 AI（Agentic AI）的兴起对 CPU 算力的需求是传统 AI 的四倍，而当前数据中心市场对这一需求的供给严重不足。他同时透露，已有多家客户主动向 Arm 提出定制芯片的需求，这也促使公司推出了首款自研芯片产品。

The product, named Arm AGI CPU, is independently designed by Arm and manufactured by TSMC. It has already received orders from multiple companies including Meta, SAP, Cloudflare, Cisco, and OpenAI, with shipments expected to begin by the end of this year. 该产品名为 Arm AGI CPU，由 Arm 自主设计、台积电代工制造，目前已获得 Meta、SAP、Cloudflare、Cisco、OpenAI 等多家企业的订单，预计将于今年年底开始出货。

Regarding market size, Haas provided a set of contrasting figures: under Arm's traditional licensing model, the potential market size corresponding to royalty revenue from cloud computing and AI businesses is approximately $3 billion; however, the new AGI CPU product line is projected to have a potential market size exceeding $100 billion within the next four to five years. 在市场规模方面，Haas 给出了一组对比鲜明的数字：Arm 传统授权模式下，云计算与 AI 业务带来的版税收入对应的潜在市场规模约为 30 亿美元；而 AGI CPU 这条新产品线在未来四至五年内， 潜在市场规模将超过 1000 亿美元 。

If broader AI application scenarios such as robots and wearables are taken into consideration, Arm's total addressable market could even exceed $1 trillion . 若将机器人、可穿戴设备等更广泛的 AI 应用场景纳入考量，Arm 可触达的整体市场规模甚至可能超过 1 万亿美元 。

Haas emphasized that AI is a technology that "reaches the entire planet," and Arm has opportunities to participate in it through IP licensing, computing subsystems, or chip products, whether for data centers, robots, or small wearable devices. He believes that Arm's market opportunities "have become much broader than before." Haas 强调，AI 是一项「触达整个地球」的技术，无论是数据中心、机器人还是小型可穿戴设备，Arm 均有机会以 IP 授权、计算子系统或芯片产品的形式参与其中。他认为，Arm 的市场机遇「已经变得远比以前宽广得多」。

item.title: 限时 19.39 万元起，焕新极氪 007GT 正式上市
item.guid: 限时-19.39-万元起，焕新极氪-007GT-正式上市
item.description:
Yesterday, Zeekr officially launched the refreshed Zeekr 007 and refreshed Zeekr 007GT at a press conference. Both models adopt a unified pricing strategy, with official guide prices starting from 203,900 RMB, and a limited-time launch offer price starting from 193,900 RMB. 昨日，极氪在发布会上正式推出焕新极氪 007 与焕新极氪 007GT，两款车型采用同价策略，官方指导价均为 20.39 万元起，限时上市权益价 19.39 万元起。

    The 007GT rear-wheel drive version accelerates from 0-100 km/h in 4.8 seconds, and the all-wheel drive version in 2.85 seconds; the 75kWh Shen Dun Jin Zhuan battery / 103kWh Qilin battery correspond to CLTC ranges of 702km / 880km, respectively, supporting 5.5C and 6C fast charging, with SoC from 10% to 80% in as fast as 10 minutes;

    Body dimensions (L/W/H) are 4858/1900/1450mm, with a wheelbase of 2925mm; new FR-LINE performance package includes 20-inch Thunder forged wheels, orange four-piston calipers, and racing yellow Dinamica sport interior;

    Standard equipped with 31 sensing hardware (including 1 LiDAR) + Thor-U chip, Qianli Haohan H7 solution, and new 120km/h high-speed tire blowout stability control;

    Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chip, 35.5-inch AR-HUD + 15.4-inch 2.5K central control screen + 13.02-inch instrument cluster triple screen;

    Standard closed air suspension + CCD electromagnetic damping + intelligent magic carpet, with a new Sport+ mode, and a track mode optional for the four-wheel drive version; the trunk has a capacity of 645L, expandable to a maximum of 1737L, supporting a 150kg roof rack and a 1.6-ton electric tow hook.

item.title: 华为 Pura 90 定档 4 月 20 日
item.guid: 华为-Pura-90-定档-4-月-20-日
item.description:
Yesterday, Huawei announced that the Pura Series and All-Scenario New Product Launch Event will be held on April 20th at 14:30 . This event is expected to unveil the imaging flagship Pura 90 series, the new "wide foldable" Pura X Max, and multiple wearable new products including headphones, watches, and AI glasses. 昨天，华为宣布， Pura 系列及全场景新品发布会将于 4 月 20 日 14:30 举行 。本次发布会预计推出影像旗舰 Pura 90 系列、全新「阔折叠」Pura X Max，以及涵盖耳机、手表、AI 眼镜在内的多款可穿戴新品。

Huawei also released the appearance of the Pura 90 Pro Max. The body continues the family design with a triangular camera deco, but the screen form has changed from the previous generation's equal-depth quad-curved screen to a flat screen design consistent with the Mate 80 series. 华为同步放出了 Pura 90 Pro Max 的外观。机身延续三角形相机 Deco 的家族设计，但屏幕形态从前代等深四曲屏改为与 Mate 80 系列一致的直屏设计。

In terms of imaging, according to leaks from Digital Chat Station, the Pura 90 Pro Max will feature a 200-megapixel, 1/1.28-inch periscope lens, equipped with a custom large aperture and telephoto macro, and the "one lens, dual view" feature is highly unlikely to be inherited ; the 1-inch main camera is likely exclusive to the Pura 90 Pro Max, with other versions using a 1/1.28-inch main camera. 影像方面，据数码闲聊站爆料，Pura 90 Pro Max 将搭载 2 亿像素、1/1.28 英寸潜望镜，配备定制大光圈与长焦微距， 「一镜双目」特性大概率不会继承 ；1 英寸主摄很可能仅为 Pura 90 Pro Max 独占，其余版本采用 1/1.28 英寸主摄。

There are five color options: the main color "Orange Sea," "Sunset Purple" (purple-yellow gradient), "Emerald Lake" (green-white gradient), "Obsidian Black," and "Morning Gold." 配色共五款，分别为主打色「橘子海」、「霞光紫」（紫黄渐变）、「翡翠湖」（绿白渐变）、「曜石黑」和「晨曦金」。

item.title: 卢伟冰官宣 REDMI Book Pro 2026，本月发布
item.guid: 卢伟冰官宣-REDMI-Book-Pro-2026，本月发布
item.description:
Yesterday, Lu Weibing, Partner and President of Xiaomi Group, officially announced the REDMI Book Pro 2026 laptop, which will be released this month alongside the REDMI K90 Max, positioned as REDMI's new high-performance AI flagship laptop. Online leaks are as follows: 昨天，小米集团合伙人、总裁卢伟冰官宣了 REDMI Book Pro 2026 笔记本，将于本月与 REDMI K90 Max 同场发布，定位 REDMI 全新高性能 AI 旗舰笔记本。网传爆料如下：

    Available in 14-inch and 16-inch dual versions, continuing the design of the previous generation mold;

    Equipped with up to the third-generation Intel Core Ultra X7 358H processor, paired with LPDDR5X high-frequency memory, supporting expansion to 32GB + 1TB / 4TB PCIe 4.0 SSD;

    Features the new Super Xiao Ai, supporting the creation of a local personal knowledge base, enabling cross-device file retrieval while protecting user privacy;

    Added one-key remote power on/off function to meet users' urgent office needs when away;

    The 16-inch version is equipped with a 99Wh ultra-large capacity battery, and the 14-inch version with a 92Wh battery, with energy density increased by 9.6% compared to the previous generation. Both support 90W PPS reverse fast charging, capable of quickly charging mobile phones.

item.title: 小鹏 x 福耀量产 AI 调光隐私玻璃，GX 首发搭载
item.guid: 小鹏-x-福耀量产-AI-调光隐私玻璃，GX-首发搭载
item.description:
Yesterday, Xpeng Group and Fuyao Group jointly held a launch event at the Fuyao Glass Park in Fuzhou, where their co-developed AI dimming privacy glass officially debuted and completed its first mass production delivery. 昨天，小鹏集团与福耀集团在福州福耀玻璃园区联合举办发布活动，双方共同研发的 AI 调光隐私玻璃正式亮相，并完成首块量产交付。

This glass will debut on the Xpeng GX. Its core technology is based on the LC dye liquid crystal principle, which adjusts light transmittance by controlling molecular alignment through an electric field, and achieves intelligent adaptation by combining with the vehicle's electronic and electrical architecture and AI large models. 这款玻璃将首发搭载于小鹏 GX。其核心技术基于 LC 染料液晶原理，通过电场控制分子排列来调节透光度，并结合整车电子电气架构与 AI 大模型实现智能适配。

    Dimming response speed reaches 0.16 seconds, with light transmittance as low as 0.6% in privacy mode, and an adjustment range exceeding 12%;

    In dark mode, it can block 99.9% of ultraviolet rays and 99.4% of visible light;

    The Xpeng GX is equipped with a total of 6 AI dimming privacy glass panels, with a total area of 1.88 ㎡, the largest in its class;

    Features a 5-layer laminated structure with custom sound insulation film, reducing noise by 3 ~ 5 dB compared to tempered glass of the same thickness;

    The electro-controlled liquid crystal dimming technology involves no chemical changes or material wear throughout its operation, and is officially claimed to achieve millions of dimming cycles without degradation;

    Supports AI adaptive dimming, achieving stepless adjustment based on external light perception, automatically matching the optimal light transmittance.

item.title: 无问芯穹发布端云一体智能终端 InfiniClaw Box
item.guid: 无问芯穹发布端云一体智能终端-InfiniClaw-Box
item.description:
Wuwenshinqiong officially released the InfiniClaw Box, an edge-cloud integrated intelligent terminal, yesterday. It focuses on privacy protection, performing data anonymization locally, leveraging cloud-based large model inference, and then feeding the results back to the local device, ensuring "data never leaves the box" throughout the entire process. 无问芯穹昨天正式发布端云一体智能终端 InfiniClaw Box，主打隐私保护，在本地完成数据脱敏、借助云端大模型推理、再将结果回填至本地，全程实现「数据不出盒」。

    Full-modality anonymization: Supports local anonymization of text, image, audio, and video data. It can automatically identify and replace sensitive information such as names, phone numbers, ID numbers, financial data, and medical records, breaking through the limitations of existing solutions that only cover text;

    Cloud-based powerful model invocation: Anonymized requests are connected to the Wuwenshinqiong large model service platform, allowing for low-cost invocation of leading models such as GLM-5, Kimi-K2.5, MiniMax-M2.5, and Step-3.5 to perform complex inference. The cloud cannot access raw data throughout the entire process;

    Local privacy re-filling: Cloud results are automatically re-filled by the local "privacy reconstruction engine" with precise location awareness, ensuring the completeness and contextual consistency of the output, which is no different from pure cloud processing;

    Multi-source access: Supports connecting to home cameras, smart door locks, external microphones, and plans to connect to terminals such as computers, smart glasses, mobile phones, and tablets, providing standardized open interfaces;

    Chip performance optimization: Through deep NPU/GPU operator fusion, tensor layout optimization, and memory reuse, core operators such as Attention and GEMM achieve a 10% to 40% acceleration;

    Built-in vertical Skills: Over 80 professional skills are pre-installed for scenarios such as government affairs processing, investment research reports, and smart office.

At the ecosystem level, InfiniClaw Box has established partnerships with companies such as Aixin Yuanzhi, AMD, Cixin Technology, Caidazi, Wanxiang Zhiwei, Kuai Technology, and Yuexiang, covering multiple dimensions including chip adaptation, peripheral interconnection, and application scenario co-creation. 在生态层面，InfiniClaw Box 已与爱芯元智、AMD、此芯科技、财搭子、万象智维、酷爱科技、跃向等企业建立合作，覆盖芯片适配、外设互联与应用场景共创等多个维度。

item.title: MiniMax Music 2.6 发布
item.guid: MiniMax-Music-2.6-发布
item.description:
Yesterday, MiniMax officially released its new generation music generation model, Music 2.6. 昨天，MiniMax 正式发布新一代音乐生成模型 Music 2.6。

It is reported that this update has deeply refactored the underlying generation architecture, significantly reducing the first-packet delay to within 20 seconds, and achieving comprehensive improvements in music control capabilities and acoustic quality. MiniMax also launched a new "Cover" creation feature, opening a 14-day free internal test for global creators. 据悉，此次更新对底层生成架构进行了深度重构，首包延迟大幅降至 20 秒以内，并在音乐控制能力与声学品质方面实现全面提升。MiniMax 还推出了全新的「Cover」创作功能，面向全球创作者开启为期 14 天的免费内测。

MiniMax simultaneously launched and open-sourced 3 Music Skills: minimax-music-gen2 (exclusive musician), minimax-music-playlist (personalized playlist generator), and buddy-sings (pet singer), aiming to integrate professional music generation capabilities directly into the AI developer ecosystem. MiniMax 同步推出并开源了 3 个 Music Skill：minimax-music-gen2（专属音乐人）、minimax-music-playlist（个性歌单生成器）和 buddy-sings（宠物歌手），旨在将专业音乐生成能力直接融入 AI 开发者生态。

item.title: 智源开源 AI 智能体安全框架 ClawKeeper
item.guid: 智源开源-AI-智能体安全框架-ClawKeeper
item.description:
Recently, the Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence (BAAI), in collaboration with Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications and the China Academy of Information and Communications Technology (CAICT), released the AI agent real-time security framework ClawKeeper v1.0. The project has been open-sourced on GitHub, and the paper was published simultaneously. 近日，北京智源人工智能研究院联合北京邮电大学与中国信息通信研究院发布 AI 智能体实时安全框架 ClawKeeper v1.0，项目已在 GitHub 开源，论文同步发布。

ClawKeeper is designed specifically for the OpenClaw platform, with the core idea of "using AI agents to supervise AI agents." It pioneers a three-layer defense architecture comprising Skills, Plugins, and Watchers, covering the entire lifecycle security of AI agents. ClawKeeper 专为 OpenClaw 平台设计，核心思路是「用 AI 智能体监管 AI 智能体」，首创技能（Skill）、插件（Plugin）、观察者（Watcher）三层防御架构，覆盖 AI 智能体全生命周期安全。

Among them, the Watcher component, completely independent of business logic, acts as a system-level security middleware. It can evaluate the tool invocation trajectory of each interaction in real-time, and upon detecting high-risk operations, directly take over the execution process and forcibly trigger manual confirmation, thoroughly resolving the fundamental contradiction of "security and efficiency mutually restricting each other" in traditional solutions. 其中，完全独立于业务逻辑之外的 Watcher 组件作为系统级安全中间件，可实时评估每一轮交互的工具调用轨迹，在检测到高危操作时直接接管执行流程并强制触发人工确认，彻底解决了传统方案中「安全与效率相互牵制」的根本矛盾。

In benchmark tests, ClawKeeper achieved 100% coverage for 7 types of high-risk scenarios, including prompt injection, credential leakage, and dangerous command execution, with a defense success rate of 85% to 90%. 在基准测试中，ClawKeeper 对提示词注入、凭据泄露、危险命令执行等 7 类高危场景实现 100% 覆盖，防御成功率达 85% 至 90%。

Watcher also possesses continuous learning capabilities; after processing 100 adversarial samples consecutively, the defense success rate further increased from 90% to 95%. Watcher 还具备持续学习能力，在连续处理 100 个对抗性样本后，防御成功率从 90% 进一步提升至 95%。

💻 GitHub: github.com/SafeAI-Lab-X/ClawKeeper 💻 GitHub: github.com/SafeAI-Lab-X/ClawKeeper

📑 Paper: arxiv.org/abs/2603.24414 📑 论文：arxiv.org/abs/2603.24414

item.title: 现代电动品牌 IONIQ 将通过北现工厂进行国产
item.guid: 现代电动品牌-IONIQ-将通过北现工厂进行国产
item.description:
According to Blue Whale Auto, Hyundai Motor's electrified brand IONIQ will be localized through the Beijing Hyundai factory, officially entering the Chinese market as a brand. Previously, IONIQ models were sold in China as imports. 据蓝鲸汽车报道，现代汽车旗下电动化品牌 IONIQ（艾尼氪）将通过北京现代工厂进行国产，正式以品牌形式进入中国市场。此前，IONIQ 旗下车型曾以进口形式在国内销售。

This year, IONIQ will launch new vehicles, and multiple models will be introduced over the next three years, covering mid-to-large segmented markets, including SUV and coupe body styles, and offering both pure electric and extended-range power options. It is reported that all its products will be named after planets orbiting the sun and will be originally designed by a Chinese design team. 今年，IONIQ 将有新车上市，未来三年还将推出多款车型，覆盖中、大型细分市场，涵盖 SUV 和轿跑两种车身形式，提供纯电和增程两种动力选择。据悉，其全系产品将以围绕太阳公转的行星命名，由中国设计团队原创打造。

Regarding its localization strategy, IONIQ will be deeply implemented across four dimensions: design, technology, product, and operations. For batteries, the brand is expected to partner with CATL; for intelligent driving, it will collaborate with Momenta. In terms of channels, the brand plans to create brand strongholds like the 'Beijing Hyundai Automotive Culture Center' that go beyond traditional car showrooms. 在本土化策略上，IONIQ 将在设计、技术、产品和运营四个维度深度落地。电池方面，该品牌预计将与宁德时代合作；智能驾驶方面，将与 Momenta 展开合作。渠道上，品牌计划打造「北京现代汽车文化中心」等超越传统汽车展厅的品牌据点。

The IONIQ brand was established in 2020, evolving from an earlier single model of the same name by Hyundai Motor. In February 2021, the IONIQ 5 was officially launched, followed by the successive release of global models such as the IONIQ 6, IONIQ 9, and the high-performance IONIQ 5N. The brand's cumulative sales have now exceeded 550,000 units. IONIQ 品牌成立于 2020 年，由现代汽车早期的同名单一车型演变而来。2021 年 2 月，IONIQ 5 正式发布，此后相继推出 IONIQ 6、IONIQ 9 及高性能版本 IONIQ 5N 等全球车型，品牌累计销量目前已超过 55 万辆。

item.title: Alienware 外星人游戏嘉年华下周登陆上海
item.guid: Alienware-外星人游戏嘉年华下周登陆上海
item.description:
The Alienware Gaming Interactive Carnival will land at the West Bund Dome Art Center in Shanghai from April 17th to 18th this year. The event will showcase over 40 popular global game IPs, esports competitions, Coser parades, and brand product experiences. Alienware 外星人游戏互动嘉年华将于今年 4 月 17 日至 18 日登陆上海西岸穹顶艺术中心，活动集中呈现 40 余款全球热门游戏 IP、电竞赛事、Coser 巡游及品牌产品体验。

This carnival features an exclusive product experience zone, where Alienware high-end gaming PCs, professional esports monitors, professional-grade esports peripherals, and the new thin and light flagship laptops will all be showcased, accompanied by over a hundred Alienware high-performance esports devices for players to try out. 本次嘉年华设有专属产品体验区，Alienware 外星人高端游戏 PC、专业电竞显示器、职业级电竞外设及全新轻薄旗舰本将悉数亮相，搭配超百台 Alienware 外星人高性能电竞设备供玩家上手试玩。

At the competition level, Alienware's self-operated esports event brand AGA (ALIENWARE GAME ARENA) Spring City Finals will kick off on April 17th on the main stage, with players from major regions across the country competing. The Alienware University Esports Finals will be held concurrently, featuring a showdown between Shanghai Ocean University and Central South University. 赛事层面，Alienware 自营电竞赛事品牌 AGA（ALIENWARE GAME ARENA）春季城市总决赛将于 4 月 17 日在主舞台打响，来自全国各大赛区的选手将同台角逐。Alienware 外星人高校电竞赛总决赛同期举行，由上海海洋大学与中南大学展开对决。

item.title: 康师傅「再来一瓶」全国兑奖难引发投诉潮
item.guid: 康师傅「再来一瓶」全国兑奖难引发投诉潮
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Master Kong's 'Another Bottle' promotional campaign, relaunched in March this year, has encountered difficulties in prize redemption. The campaign covers two specifications of green tea products, with a total of over 44 million virtual prizes, and the redemption period ends on September 30th this year. 据界面新闻报道，康师傅今年 3 月重启的「再来一瓶」促销活动遭遇「兑奖难」问题。该活动涵盖两种规格绿茶产品，虚拟奖品总量超 4400 万份，兑奖期截至今年 9 月 30 日。

Mr. Zhu from Xi'an, Shaanxi, was rejected by 4 stores after following the mini-program's instructions; Mr. Shao from Zibo, Shandong, won multiple prizes but received no reply after calling customer service; Ms. Wang from Tianjin visited five or six stores in vain, and customer service promised 'dedicated follow-up,' but no one contacted her until the prize expired. 陕西西安朱先生按小程序指引辗转 4 家门店均遭拒；山东淄博邵先生多次中奖，拨打客服电话迟迟未获回复；天津王女士跑遍五六家门店无功而返，客服承诺「专人跟进」，直至奖品过期也无人联系。

Some consumers bluntly stated: 'Don't run promotions if you can't fulfill redemptions.' 有消费者直言：「没有兑换能力就别做活动」。

item.title: 不吸也违法：香港公共场所全面禁止持有电子烟
item.guid: 不吸也违法：香港公共场所全面禁止持有电子烟
item.description:
According to Nandu Bay Finance, Hong Kong will officially implement its strictest new anti-smoking regulations starting April 30th this year, prohibiting anyone from possessing e-cigarettes, heated tobacco products, and herbal cigarettes in public places. It is noteworthy that even merely carrying them without actually smoking constitutes a violation. 据南都·湾财社报道，香港将于今年 4 月 30 日起正式实施最严控烟新规，禁止任何人在公众场所持有电子烟、加热烟及草本烟。值得注意的是，即便只是随身携带而未实际吸食，同样构成违法。

According to Hong Kong's 'Smoking (Public Health) (Amendment) Ordinance 2025,' penalties for violations are divided into two tiers based on the quantity held: 根据香港《2025 年控烟法例（修订）条例》，违规处罚按持有数量分为两档：

    Possession of no more than 5 pods, 5 ml of e-liquid, 100 heated tobacco sticks, or 100 herbal cigarettes will incur a fixed penalty of HKD 3,000;

    If the quantity held exceeds the above standards, it will be handled by prosecution, and upon conviction, the maximum penalty can be a fine of HKD 50,000 and imprisonment for 6 months;

    If the person concerned refuses to cooperate in providing identification or intentionally obstructs law enforcement, the maximum fine can be increased to HKD 10,000.

Regarding the scope of enforcement, public places include streets, shopping malls, parks, and common areas of residential buildings or office blocks (such as lobbies, elevators, corridors, etc.). Currently, the only place where possession is legally permitted is within private residences. 在执法范围上，公众场所涵盖街道、商场、公园，以及住宅大厦或办公楼的公共区域（如大厅、电梯、走廊等），目前唯一合法持有的场所仅限私人住宅内部。

The Hong Kong Department of Health explicitly stated that the new regulations will be strictly enforced starting April 30th, with no transition period and no 'warning for first-time offenders' mechanism. Travelers visiting Hong Kong will also not be exempt. 香港卫生署明确表示，新规自 4 月 30 日起即严格执行，不设过渡期，亦不存在「首次违规先警告」的机制，赴港旅客同样不会获得豁免。

item.title: One Fun Thing｜SBTI 人格测试一夜刷屏：31 道题骂你是「废物」，服务器崩了三次
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜SBTI-人格测试一夜刷屏：31-道题骂你是「废物」，服务器崩了三次
item.description:
Recently, a personality test called SBTI (Silly Big Test Inventory) surged to the top of trending topics and caused widespread sharing on WeChat Moments. 日前，一款名为 SBTI（Silly Big Test Inventory）的人格测试冲上热搜，并在朋友圈引发大规模刷屏。

🔗 Related reading: SBTI says I'm useless, that's the most comfortable thing I've heard this year 🔗 相关阅读： SBTI说我废物，这是今年听过最舒服的一句话

Based on the MBTI framework, this test introduced a series of absurd and self-deprecating labels such as 'Siren,' 'Monkey,' 'Useless,' and 'Deceased.' The test page even directly declared, 'MBTI is outdated, SBTI is here.' 该测试以 MBTI 为框架，推出了「尤物」「吗喽」「废物」「死者」等一系列荒诞自嘲标签，测试页面更是直接喊出「MBTI 已经过时，SBTI 来了」。

SBTI consists of 31 questions, taking about 5 minutes to complete. It doesn't ask about stress or emotions, only daily attitudes and habits, ultimately providing a personality assessment with a strong sense of humor and mockery. SBTI 共设 31 道题，耗时约 5 分钟，不问压力与情绪，只问日常态度与生活习惯，最终给出带有强烈戏谑色彩的人格判定。

Unlike MBTI's usual positive descriptions, SBTI's personality descriptions are primarily self-deprecating and humorous. For example, the 'Useless' personality states: 'Give a useless person a candy, and they will return a completely trusting, sparkling gaze.' 区别于 MBTI 惯用的正向描述，SBTI 的人格描述以自嘲和调侃为主，例如「废物」人格写道：「给废物一颗糖，它会还你一个完全信任你、亮晶晶的眼神。」

Due to excessive traffic concentration, the SBTI server crashed multiple times, and a large number of users could only "cloud experience" it through screenshots. 由于流量过于集中，SBTI 服务器数度崩溃，大量用户只能靠截图「云体验」。

According to the test page, this test was created by Bilibili UP host @蛆肉儿串儿, and its initial cause was extremely mundane - simply wanting to persuade a friend who loves drinking to quit. The author claims their personality is "SHIT" and states, "Since the author's personality is that of a cynic, I have equally attacked everyone, and I apologize for that!" 据测试页面介绍，该测试由 B 站 UP 主 @蛆肉儿串儿 制作，最初的起因极为日常——只是想劝一位爱喝酒的朋友戒酒。作者自称人格为「SHIT」，并表示「由于作者的人格是愤世者，所以平等地攻击了各位，在此抱歉！」

The author also stated that they are not a psychology professional and that the test content is primarily for entertainment. 作者同时说明，自己并非心理学专业，测试内容以娱乐为主。

The balance between entertainment and professionalism was not well maintained, and the interpretations of some personalities were rather vague or completely inaccurate. I apologize for any offense caused.

Late on April 10th, the author released a new link, stating that slight modifications had been made as suggested, and "it should not crash again." 4 月 10 日深夜，作者发布新链接，称已按建议做出略微修改，「应该不会再崩了」。

💻 GitHub: github.com/UnluckyNinja/SBTI-test 💻 GitHub: github.com/UnluckyNinja/SBTI-test

👉 Test Entry: https://sbti.unun.dev 👉 测试入口: https://sbti.unun.dev

item.title: 周末看什么｜《挽救计划》
item.guid: 周末看什么｜《挽救计划》
item.description:
Project Hail Mary, co-directed by Phil Lord and Christopher Miller, written by Drew Goddard, is adapted from Andy Weir's bestselling sci-fi novel of the same name. 《挽救计划》（Project Hail Mary）由菲尔·罗德与克里斯托弗·米勒联合执导，德鲁·戈达德编剧，改编自安迪·威尔同名畅销科幻小说。

The film stars Ryan Gosling as middle school science teacher Ryland Grace - a "tool" passively drawn into a crisis threatening human survival. In the story's setting, a space microorganism called "Astrophage" is consuming the sun, and Earth's civilization faces annihilation. 影片主演瑞恩·高斯林饰演中学科学教师瑞恩·格雷斯——一个被动卷入人类存亡危机的「工具人」。故事设定中，一种名为「噬星体」的太空微生物正在吞噬太阳，地球文明面临灭顶之灾。

With no choice, Grace is sent on a one-way space mission, alone, to Tau Ceti to find a solution. Along the way, he unexpectedly encounters "Rocky," an alien engineer also in dire straits, and two vastly different civilizations begin cross-species collaboration to jointly unravel the threat of the Astrophage. 格雷斯在毫无选择的情况下被送上单程太空任务，孤身前往鲸鱼座 T 星寻找解法。途中，他意外与同样身处绝境的外星工程师「洛基」相遇，两个截然不同的文明由此展开跨物种协作，共同破解噬星体的威胁。

As of now, Project Hail Mary has received an 8.6 rating on Douban, with over 320,000 people participating in the scoring. 截至目前，《挽救计划》在豆瓣获得 8.6 分，逾 32 万人参与评分。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《大厂小民：我在互联网公司的 1480 天》
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《大厂小民：我在互联网公司的-1480-天》
item.description:
This book records Zhang Xiaoman's personal experience of working for four years at a major internet company from a first-person perspective. As a frontline employee in the middle-office department, she experienced one "startup," three positions, seven evaluations, and two layoffs in 1480 days. 这本书以第一人称视角记录了张小满在互联网大厂工作四年的亲历。作为中台部门的一线员工，她在 1480 天里经历了一次「创业」、三个岗位、七次考核、两次被裁员。

She likens this job to "a crystal entrusted by others, so precious yet so easily lost." 她将这份工作比喻成「一颗来自他人寄存的水晶，如此可贵又如此容易失去」。

She categorizes employees of large companies into three types: "sweeping monks" who deeply cultivate professional fields, "salespeople" who are good at packaging and persuasion, and "farmers" who work diligently but have no chance of promotion or salary increase. 她将大厂员工归纳为三类：深耕专业领域的「扫地僧」、擅长包装说服的「销售员」，以及默默耕耘却与升职加薪无缘的「农民」。

Everyone hopes to become a "sweeping monk," but in the end, most people end up doing the work of "farmers."

The coexistence of comprehensive benefits and high-pressure evaluations is precisely the root cause of why large companies make people "criticize while turning following into a habit." Zhang Xiaoman was eventually laid off during an economic downturn, after which she completed her writing, questioning the essence of work: "The essence of work is a transaction, but it shouldn't be just that." 完备福利与高压考核并存，正是大厂让人「一边批判，一边把追随变成习惯」的根源。张小满最终在经济下行期被裁员，此后完成写作，追问工作的本质：「工作本质是交易，但不应只是如此。」

item.title: 游戏推荐｜《红色沙漠》
item.guid: 游戏推荐｜《红色沙漠》
item.description:
Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure game developed and published by Korean developer Pearl Abyss, with the mercenary Kliff as the main character. 《红色沙漠》（Crimson Desert）是由韩国开发商 Pearl Abyss 开发并发行的开放世界动作冒险游戏，以雇佣兵 Kliff 为主线角色展开叙事。

The game integrates diverse gameplay elements such as exploration, combat, puzzles, and mini-games, ambitiously attempting to combine The Witcher 3-style adventure, Red Dead Redemption 2-style slow-paced narrative, Tears of the Kingdom's open-world puzzles, and the freedom of The Elder Scrolls series into one. 游戏融合了探索、战斗、解谜、迷你游戏等多元玩法，野心勃勃地试图将《巫师 3》式的冒险、《荒野大镖客：救赎 2》式的慢节奏叙事、《王国之泪》的开放解谜与《上古卷轴》系列的自由度整合于一体。

After its launch, the game's reception showed clear polarization. Media aggregation platform Metacritic gave the PC version an overall score of 78/100, and OpenCritic's critic recommendation rate was 82%. 游戏上线后口碑呈现明显的两极分化。媒体聚合平台 Metacritic 给出 PC 版综合评分 78/100，OpenCritic 评论推荐率为 82%。

IGN reviewer Travis Northup, after approximately 130 hours of main and side quests, gave it a 6/10 rating, calling it "ambitious, but wildly oscillates between impressive and infuriating." IGN 评测人 Travis Northup 在经历约 130 小时的主线及支线流程后，给出 6/10 的评价，称其「极具野心，却在令人印象深刻与令人抓狂之间剧烈摇摆」。
